---
name: 'Grant scoping '
about: Possible grant(s) for your FSC or Incubation Fellowship
title: Grant scoping
labels: ''
assignees: ''

---
# Funder 
<--! Which organisation is giving out the grant that you want to apply for-->

# Name of grant 
<--! Some funders have multiple grants open. Which one are you applying for?-->

# Link to the call for applications for the grant

# Deadline
<--! You should open this issue a month or more before the deadline!-->

# Eligibility
I/We have checked that:
- [ ] UK-based organisations are eligible to receive money from the grant
- [ ] Activities in your country are eligible for the grant
- [ ] The grant covers the kinds of activities that I/we want to do
- [ ] The grant will cover OLS's fiscal sponsorship (15% for FSCs, 7.5% for Incubation Fellows)
<--! Some grants exclude certain kinds of costs. If a grant says that it will not cover overheads or administrative fees, it is likely that it will not cover the fees that OLS covers-->

# Draft budget (optional)
<--! If you have already started drawing up a budget, put a link to it here-->
